How It Works

Call to Completion
in Hours — Not Days

01

You Call Us

Live dispatcher picks up immediately — 24/7, no voicemail, no hold queue. We get your location and damage description in under 2 minutes.

02

Tech Dispatched

Nearest technician is rolling within 5 minutes. Arrives with board-up materials and common glass sizes loaded on the truck.

03

Secured & Documented

Professional board-up installed. Photos taken, written damage report completed for your insurance company on the same visit.

04

Glass Installed

Permanent commercial glass installed — usually same day or next day. Site cleaned, you're back open, done.

Common Questions

FAQ

How fast can you get to my business after I call?
Our average on-site response time is under 45 minutes anywhere in Washington DC, Northern Virginia, Maryland, and New York. We have technicians and fully stocked service vehicles positioned throughout the region so we can reach most locations quickly regardless of time of day or day of week.
Do you work with insurance companies?
Yes — this is one of the most common things we help with. We photograph and document the damage, provide professional written estimates in the format most insurers require, and can communicate directly with your insurance adjuster. Commercial glass breakage from break-ins, vandalism, vehicle impact, and storms is typically covered under commercial property insurance.
Can you replace glass the same day?
For standard commercial glass sizes — yes, in most cases. We stock the most common commercial glass sizes on our service trucks. For custom sizes or specialty glass (laminated, low-e, colored), we typically need 24–48 hours. We board up immediately while your glass is being fabricated.
Do you serve areas outside DC?
Yes — our service area includes Washington DC, all of Northern Virginia (Tysons, Alexandria, Arlington, Fairfax, Reston, Herndon, Manassas), all of Maryland (Montgomery County, Prince George's County, Baltimore metro), New York and surrounding suburbs, and we also serve New York and Long Island for scheduled work and emergency calls.
Are you licensed and insured?
Yes. We hold commercial glazing contractor licenses in DC, Virginia, Maryland, and Pennsylvania. All technicians are background-checked, and we carry $2M general liability insurance on every job. We can provide certificates of insurance upon request — common for property managers and building owners.

Commercial Glass Repair Specialists — Serving the Mid-Atlantic Since 2010

When your storefront glass breaks — whether it's 2pm on a Tuesday or 3am on a Sunday — every minute your business is unsecured costs you money and creates safety risk. Commercial Glass Experts was built around one simple promise: when you call, we come. Fast, professional, and done right the first time.

We specialize exclusively in commercial glazing. That means our technicians understand aluminum storefront systems, commercial thermal break framing, curtain wall glazing, and the specific building code requirements in DC, Virginia, Maryland, and Pennsylvania. We don't do residential work — commercial glass is all we do, which is why property managers, retailers, restaurant groups, and building owners call us first.

Storefront Glass Repair — The Right Way

Commercial storefront glass isn't just glass — it's a system. The glass, the aluminum frame, the wet glaze, the structural silicone, the door hardware, and the threshold all work together. When one component fails, the system fails. Our glaziers are trained to assess the entire system, not just swap out the broken pane.

  • Tempered glass replacement — same-day for standard sizes, 24–48hr for custom
  • Laminated security glass — for high-theft-risk retail and financial locations
  • Insulated glass units (IGU) — energy-efficient double and triple-pane replacements
  • Full storefront system replacement — frame, glass, hardware, and sealant
  • Emergency board-up — immediate, professional, weatherproof

Why Property Managers Choose Us for Multiple Locations

Managing commercial glass across multiple locations means you need a contractor who responds consistently, documents work professionally, and can be trusted to handle insurance claims correctly. That's exactly what we offer. We maintain service agreements with property management firms across DC, Virginia, and Maryland — giving them priority dispatch and discounted rates in exchange for an ongoing relationship.

Call 703-244-0559 to ask about our property management service agreements. Or visit our Washington DC service page, Northern Virginia page, or Maryland page to learn more about coverage in your area.
